_provenance.note: This Stage 1 JSON was reconstructed from the currently-published cards so external Stage 2 (Gemini bias) and Stage 3 (Codex fact-check) reviews can verify what readers see. It is not the original analysis — the original pipeline was not run on this issue.

headline: RM2.27 Billion, 25 Charges, One Verdict, and the Bill Nobody Mentions
context: Najib Razak convicted on all 25 charges over RM2.27 billion from 1MDB on Dec 26, 2025. 15 years jail, RM11.38 billion fine. RM24.46 billion 1MDB debt still outstanding.

cards.text: The trial heard 76 witnesses and rejected four forged Saudi letters. The appeal was filed four days later.
cards.sub: Rallies, T-shirts, 'Bossku'. The response missed the RM42 billion debt and the patronage every party still uses.

cards.h: Judge declared four Saudi donation letters forgeries. Najib convicted on all 25 charges.
cards.s: Statutory fine: 5× the gratification. Total: RM11.38 billion. Appeal filed December 30.
cards.d: Judge declared four Saudi donation letters forgeries. Najib convicted on all 25 charges. Statutory fine: 5× the gratification. Total: RM11.38 billion. Appeal filed December 30.

cards.h: RM42 billion paid in 1MDB debt servicing. B40 women-led households feel it in shrinking social safety nets.
cards.s: RM24.46 billion still outstanding; RM9.02 billion in sukuk runs to 2039. More than a third of the 2026 education budget.
cards.d: RM42 billion paid in 1MDB debt servicing. B40 women-led households feel it in shrinking social safety nets. RM24.46 billion still outstanding; RM9.02 billion in sukuk runs to 2039. More than a third of the 2026 education budget.

cards.h: PH, BN, PN, GPS, GRS: every major coalition runs on patronage. None will dismantle it voluntarily.
cards.s: A draft political financing bill has sat since 2022. Anwar's unity government has not tabled it.
cards.d: PH, BN, PN, GPS, GRS: every major coalition runs on patronage. None will dismantle it voluntarily. A draft political financing bill has sat since 2022. Anwar's unity government has not tabled it.

cards.text: Najib is convicted. Political financing reform is still unpassed.
Connected elites across communities benefit. Vulnerable households, many women-led, carry the cost.

confidence: Low — derived from published cards, original brief not on disk; submit for retroactive Stage 2/3 verification
